fields.name: Requirements
fields.value:
`economy` channel/log_channel (recommended) → `economy-log`
`logging` channel/mod_log (recommended) → `bot-mod-log`
`logging` channel/cleanup_log (recommended) → `bot-cleanup-log`
`logging` channel/debug_log (recommended) → `bot-debug-log`
`logging` channel/info_log (recommended) → `bot-info-log`
`logging` channel/warning_log (recommended) → `bot-warning-log`
`logging` channel/error_log (recommended) → `bot-error-log`
`logging` channel/audit_log (recommended) → `bot-audit-log`
`logging` channel/events_log (recommended) → `bot-event-log`
`logging` channel/message_log (recommended) → `bot-message-log`
`logging` channel/member_log (recommended) → `bot-member-log`
`logging` channel/role_log (recommended) → `bot-role-log`
`moderation` channel/mod_log (recommended) → `mod-logs`
`proof_channel` channel/proof (optional) → `proof`
`xp` channel/announce_channel (optional) → `level-ups`
